chunks.text: [en](https://health.ec.europa.eu/medical-devices-sector_en) Select your language * [bgбългарски](https://health.ec.europa.eu/medical-devices-sector_bg) * [esespañol](https://health.ec.europa.eu/medical-devices-sector_es) * [csčeština](https://health.ec.europa.eu/medical-devices-sector_cs) * [dadansk](https://health.ec.europa.eu/medical-devices-sector_da) * [deDeutsch](https://health.ec.europa.eu/medical-devices-sector_de) * [eteesti](https://health.ec.europa.eu/medical-devices-sector_et) * [elελληνικά](https://health.ec.europa.eu/medical-devices-sector_el) * [enEnglish](https://health.ec.europa.eu/medical-devices-sector_en) * [frfrançais](https://health.ec.europa.eu/medical-devices-sector_fr) * [gaGaeilge](https://health.ec.europa.eu/medical-devices-sector_ga) * [hrhrvatski](https://health.ec.europa.eu/medical-devices-sector_hr) * [ititaliano](https://health.ec.europa.eu/medical-devices-sector_it) * [lvlatviešu](https://health.ec.europa.eu/medical-devices-sector_lv) * [ltlietuvių](https://health.ec.europa.eu/medical-devices-sector_lt) * [humagyar](https://health.ec.europa.eu/medical-devices-sector_hu) * [mtMalti](https://health.ec.europa.eu/medical-devices-sector_mt) * [nlNederlands](https://health.ec.europa.eu/medical-devices-sector_nl) * [plpolski](https://health.ec.europa.eu/medical-devices-sector_pl) * [ptportuguês](https://health.ec.europa.eu/medical-devices-sector_pt) * [roromnă](https://health.ec.europa.eu/medical-devices-sector_ro) * [skslovenčina](https://health.ec.europa.eu/medical-devices-sector_sk) * [slslovenščina](https://health.ec.europa.eu/medical-devices-sector_sl) * [fisuomi](https://health.ec.europa.eu/medical-devices-sector_fi) * [svsvenska](https://health.ec.europa.eu/medical-devices-sector_sv) Public Health # Medical Devices - Sector [Overview](/medical-devices-sector/overview_en) Medical devices and In Vitro Diagnostic medical devices (IVDs) have a fundamental role in saving lives by providing innovative healthcare solutions… [Directives](/medical-devices-sector/directives_en) The following medical devices Directives were repealed and replaced by Regulation (EU) 2017/746 and Regulation (EU) 2017/745 respectively... [New Regulations](/medical-devices-sector/new-regulations_en) The EU revised the laws governing medical devices and in vitro diagnostics to align with the developments of the sector over the last 20 years. [EUDAMED](/medical-devices-sector/eudamed_en) EUDAMED is the IT system developed by the European Commission to implement Regulation (EU) 2017/745 on medical devices and Regulation (EU) 2017/746 on in vitro diagnosis medical devices. [In Vitro Diagnostics](/medical-devices-sector/vitro-diagnostics_en) In vitro diagnostic medical devices (IVDs) are tests used on biological samples to determine a person's health status. [Expert panels](/medical-devices-sector/expert-panels_en) Regulation (EU) 2017/745 on medical devices and Regulation (EU) 2017/746 on In Vitro Medical Devices (IVDR) require the European Commission to create expert panels to support scientific assessment and advice. [Guidance and Useful Information](/medical-devices-sector/guidance-and-useful-information_en) A range of guidance documents, factsheets and contact lists is available. [Coordination and Governance](/medical-devices-sector/coordination-and-governance_en) A number of Actors are relevant in the coordination and the governance of the medical devices sector. [Topics of Interest](/medical-devices-sector/topics-interest_en) A number of different topics are relevant for the implementation of the Medical Devices Regulations. ## Latest updates * News announcement [New Implementing Regulation sets out uniform requirements for conformity assessment and notified bodies](https://ec.europa.eu/newsroom/sante/newsletter-archives/75370) 1 min read * News announcement [Update – new manufacturer incident report PDF file (SB 11154) and important information about which MIR 7.3.1. versions are accepted from 1st May 2026](https://health.ec.europa.eu/medical-devices-sector/new-regulations/guidance-mdcg-endorsed-documents-and-other-guidance/pmsv-reporting-forms_en) 1 min read * News announcement [Implementing Regulation (EU) 2026/977 – uniform requirements for conformity assessment and notified bodies (Annex VII)](https://eur-lex.europa.eu/eli/reg_impl/2026/977/oj) 1 min read * News announcement [Update - New manufacturer incident report XSD files and XSL files (SB 11154)](https://health.ec.europa.eu/medical-devices-sector/new-regulations/guidance-mdcg-endorsed-documents-and-other-guidance/pmsv-reporting-forms_en) 1 min read [See all](https://ec.europa.eu/health/medical-devices-sector/latest-updates_en) ## Highlights [EMDN Helpdesk – Officially live!](https://health.ec.europa.eu/medical-devices-topics-interest/european-medical-devices-nomenclature-emdn_en#emdn-helpdesk) * News announcement [A Study and dashboard on reprocessing and reuse of single-use-devices in the EU](/latest-updates/study-and-dashboard-reprocessing-and-reuse-single-use-devices-eu-2024-04-10_en) 1 min read [Study supporting the monitoring of availability of medical devices on the EU market](/study-supporting-monitoring-availability-medical-devices-eu-market_en) * News announcement [Setting the scene for EU reference labs for high-risk diagnostics](/latest-updates/setting-scene-eu-reference-labs-high-risk-diagnostics-2022-06-21_en) 1 min read [26 May 2022, the Regulation (EU) 2017/746 on In Vitro Diagnostic Medical Devices is applicable within the EU](/medical-devices-new-regulations/overview_en) * News announcement [Notice to Stakeholders: Status of the EU-Switzerland Mutual Recognition Agreement (MRA) for in vitro diagnostic medical devices](/latest-updates/notice-stakeholders-status-eu-switzerland-mutual-recognition-agreement-mra-vitro-diagnostic-medical-2022-05-24_en) 1 min read [The UDI Helpdesk helps economic operators in the implementation of the requirements introduced by the new system](https://webgate.ec.europa.eu/udi-helpdesk/) [Getting ready for the new medical devices regulations – Factsheets on the main areas of the medical devices sector activities](https://ec.europa.eu/health/medical-devices-new-regulations-publications_en?f%5B0%5D=oe_publication_type%3Ahttp%3A//publications.europa.eu/resource/authority/resource-type/PUB_GEN) ##
